discovery_fixes.issue: Missing items_for directive to iterate over AggregationAuthorizations array. Emit structure was accessing response.AggregationAuthorizations directly instead of iterating over the array.
discovery_fixes.fix: Added items_for: '{{ response.AggregationAuthorizations }}' and changed all field references from response.AggregationAuthorizations.* to item.*

discovery_fixes.fix: Added items_for: '{{ response.ComplianceByConfigRules }}' and changed all field references from response.ComplianceByConfigRules.* to item.*

rule_discovery_fixes.issue: Was using describe_compliance_by_config_rule but checking ConfigRuleState which is not available in that API. Changed to use describe_config_rules.
Was using describe_compliance_by_config_rule but checking Description which is not available in that API. Changed to use describe_config_rules.
